text: Reset MFA token in Entra. Asked user to remove + re-add device from authenticator app.
Tried that — still looping. Push notification arrives but app says 'verification failed'.
Time skew on the device — MFA TOTP off by 90s. Asked user to enable automatic time sync.
Confirmed Modern Auth is enabled for the mailbox. Pulling MDM compliance status.
Intune shows the device pending a config-profile push from this morning's tenant change. Likely root cause.
Plant network monitoring shows WAP CI-WAP-CLE-03 reboot loop, started ~22:50 yesterday. Vendor hotfix available.
Raising emergency change CHG-9001 for vendor hotfix tonight at 23:00 CT (Line 3 shift change).
